prompt: Generate a computer graphic rendering based on the reference image, illustrating facial estimation landmarks and skin property analysis overlaid on the subject's face.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphic rendering based on image 1. Display the face of the woman from image 1, overlaid with a visualization of facial estimation landmarks (such as points, lines, or meshes delineating eyes, nose, mouth, and jawline). Additionally, superimpose a graphical analysis of skin properties (e.g., color-coded regions, heatmaps, or contour lines indicating texture or hydration levels) on her face.
objects: facial estimation landmarks (points, lines, or meshes) overlaid on the face
graphical analysis of skin properties (color-coded regions, heatmaps, or contour lines) superimposed on the face
cream dot on woman's face (from image 1)
